name: Chicken Broth Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the nutritional yeast flakes and salt.
2. Add ground ginger, turmeric, black pepper, marjoram, tarragon, paprika, rosemary, sage, celery seed, thyme, garlic powder, and onion powder to the bowl.
3. Stir until all ingredients are well combined.
4. Store in an airtight container for up to one year.
